channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: In Southern California Chinese Enclave, Mayor's Arrest Raises Fears of Beijing's Influence
WHO chief urges mutual protection among communities to end Ebola outbreak
item.description: The World Health Organization's director-general arrived in Bunia, the epicenter of the Ebola outbreak in the Democratic Republic of the Congo.

item.title: Search underway for suspect in killing of sheriff's deputy
item.description: Deputy Logan Utt was killed while serving the community, according to the sheriff's office.

item.title: Iran live updates: 'Suspected' mine reported in Strait of Hormuz, authorities say
item.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.
